name: Evidence gone—machine fixed after my injury Ogden, claim dead?
description: No, other evidence like medicals and logs work.

mainEntity.name: Evidence gone—machine fixed after my injury Ogden, claim dead?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, other evidence like medicals and logs work.
acceptedAnswer.description: **No, use photos, logs, witnesses, medicals before fix.** Expert reconstructs[4]. Preserve what you can now. Many succeed. Attorney subpoenas records.
